resume_data.summary: Ayushman Chakraborty is a final year B.Tech Computer Science student with production internship experience at Wipro, delivering AI pipelines and building 3D skeletal reconstruction and biomechanical analysis systems. He is proficient in Python, data engineering, and AI integration with a strong focus on translating raw structured data into actionable visual insights.
